name: pod-restart-analysis
description: Identify pods with recent restarts and correlate with OOMKill or CrashLoopBackOff events
query:
fields @timestamp, @message, kubernetes.pod_name, kubernetes.container_name
| filter @message like /(?i)(oomkill|crashloopbackoff|backoff|restart|killed)/
| filter kubernetes.namespace_name = '${namespace}'
| stats count(*) as event_count, earliest(@timestamp) as first_seen, latest(@timestamp) as last_seen by kubernetes.pod_name, kubernetes.container_name
| sort event_count desc
| limit 10
